text: 9. PROJECT ADMINISTRATION: Subcontractor  shall  coordinate  all  work  through  Contractor's  designated  Project  Manager and/or Superintendent and other trades working on the project. Prior to starting work in the field, Subcontractor shall verify with the Project Superintendent that all plans are inclusive of the latest changes if applicable. Subcontractor shall provide a person authorized  to  make  binding  decisions  regarding  schedule  and  cost  issues  to  attend  weekly  Progress  Meetings  as  required. Subcontractor shall submit daily reports to the Contractor on a daily basis. As-Built drawings located in the jobsite trailer are to be  updated  monthly  prior  to  Subcontractor  receiving  payment.  If  the  Project  is  LEED,  Contractor  shall  require  additional documentation  from  the  Subcontractor  for  submission  to  LEED  Online,  to  be  provided  at  the  same  time  as  Submittal requirements. Subcontractor is required to generate their own punch-list and submit to Contractor for review. Subcontractor is required to complete all punch-list items within two (2) weeks of receipt of the punch-list from the Contractor.
